positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial wanderer, depicting a solitary astronaut floating among vibrant nebula clouds. The astronaut should have a clean, simplified silhouette with no visible facial features, rendered in stark white against a deep indigo and cosmic teal gradient background. The composition is centered, emphasizing the contrast between the precise, geometric helmet of the suit and the organic, fluid shapes of the cosmic gas clouds. Use fine-line engraving details for texture on the suit, and glow effects for the nebula. Style: highly stylized scientific illustration, vintage astronomical poster art, clean vector aesthetic. Lighting: soft cosmic glow from the nebula, strong contrast against the dark background. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabrics.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, logo, trademark, messy, grunge, cartoon, photorealistic, low detail, bad anatomy, noisy, extra limbs, speech bubble, out of frame
